docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRAGANZA, VIOLETA R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUSTODIO, LUCILO L. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
